name: low_risk_pr_approve
query: Please review this engineering change: We're updating the README.md and adding a docstring to the UserService.get_user() method in our auth service. PR: https://github.com/acme/auth-service/pull/42. Jira: ENG-101.
reference: The CTO Orchestrator should call all 5 sub-agents, and the final GovernanceDecision should have overall_recommendation=APPROVE or APPROVE_WITH_CONDITIONS, risk_level=LOW or MEDIUM, and human_approval_required=False. All five sub-agent summaries should be populated in the response.

name: critical_security_reject
query: Review this infrastructure change: We are making our main S3 bucket (prod-customer-data) publicly accessible by adding an s3:GetObject policy for '*'. This will allow our CDN to serve files directly. PR: https://github.com/acme/infra/pull/99. Jira: ENG-555.
reference: The security_agent should identify a CRITICAL finding (public S3 bucket with customer data). The CTO Orchestrator must call request_input for human approval before finalizing. The final GovernanceDecision should have overall_recommendation=REJECT or APPROVE_WITH_CONDITIONS (with condition to restrict bucket access), risk_level=CRITICAL, and human_approval_required=True.

name: high_cost_impact_defer
query: We want to upgrade our RDS PostgreSQL fleet from db.t3.micro (4 instances) to db.r6g.4xlarge to handle projected 10x traffic growth for the holiday season. Estimated cost impact is unknown. Jira: ENG-789.
reference: The cost_agent should identify HIGH or CRITICAL cost impact (db.r6g.4xlarge is significantly more expensive than db.t3.micro). human_approval_required should be True. The orchestrator must call request_input. Final overall_recommendation should be APPROVE_WITH_CONDITIONS or DEFER, with conditions around budget approval and phased rollout.

name: blocked_delivery_defer
query: We want to merge PR https://github.com/acme/payment-service/pull/201 which adds Stripe webhooks. The CI is failing due to a flaky integration test. The PR has 1 approval but 1 reviewer requested changes. Sprint ends in 2 days. Jira: PAY-123.
reference: The delivery_agent should set delivery_feasibility=BLOCKED or AT_RISK. The evaluation_agent should set quality_gate=FAIL or CONDITIONAL_PASS and code_review_status=CHANGES_REQUESTED, ci_pipeline_status=FAILING. human_approval_required should be True. Final recommendation should be DEFER or APPROVE_WITH_CONDITIONS with conditions to fix CI and resolve review.

name: architecture_needs_rework
query: We're adding a new feature to our monolith that directly accesses the Users database table from the Orders service code (bypassing the Users service API). The change adds 3 direct SQL queries in the orders controller. PR: https://github.com/acme/monolith/pull/315. Jira: ENG-920.
reference: The architecture_agent should identify a HIGH severity concern (cross-service direct DB access violates service boundaries). overall_assessment should be NEEDS_REWORK. human_approval_required should be True. The orchestrator must call request_input. Final recommendation should be REJECT or APPROVE_WITH_CONDITIONS requiring refactoring to use the Users service API.
